title: Dolphins Could Replace Jaylen Waddle With Former Pro Bowl WR
description: The Miami Dolphins need to find a replacement for WR Jaylen Waddle, and they could do so with a former Pro Bowler.

title: WWE Fans Demand Triple H Bring Back Kairi Sane After Surprising Release
description: WWE fans continued to express frustration with Triple H and WWE after Kairi Sane's sudden release last week.

title: Magic overcome shooting woes to push top-seeded Pistons to brink with Game 4 win
description: The Magic overcame their shooting woes by protecting the ball. They had only 12 turnovers to 20 for Detroit.

title: Betnijah Laney-Hamilton ‘felt good’ making long-awaited Liberty return in preseason opener
description: On Saturday, Betnijah Laney-Hamilton finally greeted Liberty fans again during preseason action against the Fever.
